title: Disable Potion Particles
description: A resource pack that disables potion particle effects to improve FPS and reduce distractions in PvP!
body:
# Disable Potion Particles

This resource pack disables the rendering of potion particle effects to help improve FPS and reduce distractions in PvP!

---

### Supported Versions

- 1.21.X
- 1.20.X

---

### Features

No visible potion particle effects

---

### Contact

Discord: shadowedleaves_

Feel free to message me to ask a question or suggest a new feature!
